docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MARIAPAZ
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MARIAPAZ
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY COOPER, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MARIAPAZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF COOPER, SCOTT
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT, NOTIFYING COURT OF CURRENT MAILING ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MARIAPAZ
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOPER, SCOTT
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF COOPER, SCOTT
CERTIFIED MAILING OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER (FORM SC-100) RETURNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOPER, SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MARIAPAZ $750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.00, PLAINTIFF PARTIALLY SUBSTANTIATED DAMAGES BUT NOT FULLY. DEFENDANT DID NOT BRING HER OWN CLAIM FOR THE SHARED AIRBNB PROCEEDS OR FOR ANY OTHER MONEY CLAIM OWED BY PLAINTIFFL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MARIAPAZ ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED OCT-29-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MARIAPAZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DECEMBER 21, 2015. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S AND PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. HEARING HELD, MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DECEMBER 21, 2015 BY JPT DAVID LAVINE, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MARIAPAZ
